events.summary: Initialized the public template with README, three-layer memory, rule cards, error routes, project card templates, sample data, and scripts.
Defined the public boundary: templates and sample data only; no private memory, secrets, or raw private chat transcripts.
Upgraded the positioning from an external-brain template to a local-file AI cognitive memory system.
Added a proof case showing how a failed project-memory route becomes a reusable prevention rule.
